compliance.title: Minimum wage passes
compliance.body: Ordinary hourly wage is N$72.12 against a statutory floor of N$18.00.

compliance.title: Ordinary hours risk
compliance.body: Ordinary hours are 48.00 per week, above the section 16 limit of 45 hours.

compliance.title: Daily hours pass
compliance.body: Ordinary daily hours are 8.00, within the daily cap of 8.

compliance.title: Daily overtime pass
compliance.body: Maximum daily overtime entered is 0.00 hours, within the Labour Act limit of three hours per day.

compliance.title: Weekly overtime pass
compliance.body: Maximum weekly overtime entered is 0.00 hours, within the Labour Act limit of 10 hours per week.

compliance.title: Statutory remittance reminder
compliance.body: Employee SSC is N$99.00 and employer SSC is N$99.00 on an assessable basic wage of N$11000.00. SSC payment is due within 20 days after month-end.

sources.title: Income Tax Act, 1981
sources.detail: Schedule 4 rates used for annualised PAYE: 0% to N$50,000; 18% to N$100,000; 25% to N$300,000; 28% to N$500,000; 30% to N$800,000; 32% to N$1,500,000; 37% above that.

sources.title: Social Security Act Regulations
sources.detail: Employee and employer contributions are each 0.9% of basic wage, with the deemed monthly basic wage floor at N$500 and ceiling at N$11,000 from 1 March 2025.

sources.title: Labour Act, 2007
sources.detail: Used for ordinary hours, overtime, Sunday work, public holidays, night work, annual leave, sick leave, compassionate leave, and maternity leave logic.

sources.title: National Minimum Wage Order
sources.detail: Used for the phased hourly minimum wages effective from 1 January 2025, including domestic, agriculture, and security worker carve-outs.
